tasks.title: Documentation Cleanup & Consolidation
tasks.description: Archive old docs, consolidate overlapping content, remove empty/aspirational docs, fix time-travel dates, and ensure 1:1 match with implementation
tasks.details:
1. Create /docs/archive/ directory
2. Move outdated documentation:
   - Old PRDs (anything before 2025)
   - Deprecated guides
   - Experimental feature docs
   - Cache warming docs
3. Consolidate overlapping guides:
   - Merge TRANSLATION_HELPS_COMPLETE_GUIDE.md with IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md
   - Update UW_TRANSLATION_RESOURCES_GUIDE.md to be the single source of truth
   - Merge deployment guides
4. Delete empty/incomplete docs:
   - Developer Portal content (it's 10% complete)
   - Placeholder guides
5. Fix all time-travel dates (no more 2023 references)
6. Document actual resource data shapes for each endpoint
tasks.testStrategy: Manual review of all documentation files, ensure no broken links, verify accuracy against codebase, check all dates are current

subtasks.title: Create Archive Structure
subtasks.description: Set up /docs/archive/ directory and subdirectories for organized storage
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify directory structure exists and README is clear

subtasks.title: Archive Outdated Documentation
subtasks.description: Move all deprecated and outdated documentation to archive, fix time-travel dates
subtasks.details:
Move files:
- Old PRDs (anything mentioning 2023 or earlier)
- CACHE_WARMING_*.md files
- Performance monitoring guides
- AI feature documentation
- Any guides referencing removed features
Search and replace all dates that are before project start (2 weeks ago)
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify all outdated docs are in archive, no time-travel dates remain

subtasks.title: Consolidate Core Guides
subtasks.description: Merge overlapping documentation into single authoritative sources
subtasks.details:
Actions:
- Keep UW_TRANSLATION_RESOURCES_GUIDE.md as primary reference
- Extract useful parts from TRANSLATION_HELPS_COMPLETE_GUIDE.md
- Update IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md with practical implementation details
- Create clear separation of 'what resources are' vs 'how to implement'
- Document tWL as the bridge between verses and tW articles
- Add ToC information for tA and tW resources
subtasks.testStrategy: Review merged docs for completeness, verify tWL is properly explained

subtasks.title: Document Resource Data Shapes
subtasks.description: Create clear documentation of actual data returned by each endpoint
subtasks.details:
For each resource type, document:
- Actual data structure returned
- Transformations applied (USFM to text, TSV parsing, etc.)
- Example responses with REAL data
- Parameter effects on response shape
- How tWL links verses to tW articles
- How tN links to tA articles
subtasks.testStrategy: Each endpoint has complete data documentation with examples

subtasks.title: Update Documentation Index
subtasks.description: Update main README and docs index to reflect new structure

- Main README.md with correct doc links
- docs/README.md with new structure
- Remove broken links
- Add clear navigation
- Update any doc references in code
- Add 'Last Updated' dates to all docs
subtasks.testStrategy: Click all documentation links, verify they work, check dates are current

tasks.title: Remove Deprecated UI Pages
tasks.description: Delete unused/confusing UI pages and focus on MCP Tools page as single interface
tasks.details:
Remove these routes completely:
- /api-docs/* (MCP Tools has 100% coverage)
- /test/* (black box, nobody knows what it does)
- /api-test/* (duplicate of test)
- /developer-portal/* (10% complete, full of empty content)
- /pricing/* (not relevant)
- /sverdle/* (demo app)
- /mobile-test/* (if unused)

Keep only:
- Home
- MCP Tools (primary interface)
- Changelog
- Whitepaper
- About
tasks.testStrategy: Verify all routes return 404, ensure no broken links remain, run E2E tests, check no bookmarks break (project is 2 weeks old)

tasks.title: Code Audit & Cleanup
tasks.description: Remove deprecated code, fix endpoints returning empty/bogus data, eliminate duplicate functionality
tasks.details:
1. Remove code that returns empty/bogus data
2. Fix experimental endpoints claiming to work but don't
3. Remove duplicate implementations
4. PRESERVE the working cascading cache system (DCS API â†’ Files â†’ Response)
5. KEEP the xray transparency features that work
6. Move only BROKEN experimental features to lab
7. Clean up imports and dependencies
8. Fix any code that hangs waiting for input
9. Remove interactive commands from build/test scripts
tasks.testStrategy: Run full test suite with REAL data validation, verify no hanging processes, check core endpoints return accurate data, ensure cache performance remains <500ms

- Fix or remove broken endpoints
- Ensure experimental endpoints don't claim to fetch resources they can't
Focus on core resource fetching accuracy

subtasks.title: Preserve Working Cache System

- Performance monitoring that works

These are CORE features, not experimental!

KEEP in core:

tasks.title: Design Endpoint Configuration System
tasks.description: Create a configuration-driven system to prevent copy-paste errors and ensure consistency
tasks.details:
Design EndpointConfig that handles:
- Consistent parameter naming (reference, language, resource)
- Resource-specific response shapes
- Shared shapes for same resource types
- DCS API integration details
- Transformation logic (USFM to text, TSV parsing, etc.)
- Real data examples
- Performance metrics
- Error handling

System should allow minimal code changes for new endpoints
tasks.testStrategy: Configuration system handles all core endpoints, prevents UI/API/MCP inconsistencies

subtasks.title: Design EndpointConfig Interface
subtasks.description: Create TypeScript interface for endpoint configuration
subtasks.testStrategy: Interface handles all core endpoint patterns

subtasks.title: Create Response Shape Registry
subtasks.description: Define consistent shapes for resource types
subtasks.details:
Define shapes for:
- Scripture (text, reference, version)
- Translation Notes (notes array with reference filtering)
- Translation Words (assembled articles)
- Translation Words Links (verse-to-word mappings)
- Discovery endpoints (lists with metadata)
Ensure same resource type uses same shape across endpoints
subtasks.testStrategy: Same resources have consistent shapes

subtasks.title: Build Configuration Registry
subtasks.description: Create system to manage and validate configs
subtasks.details:
Create src/config/EndpointRegistry.ts:
- Central registry for all configs
- Validation for required fields
- Type checking for params
- Prevent duplicate paths
- Export for use across app
subtasks.testStrategy: Registry prevents configuration errors

subtasks.title: Create Route Generator
subtasks.description: Auto-generate API routes from configurations
subtasks.details:
Build system to:
- Read endpoint configs
- Generate consistent route handlers
- Apply transformations (USFM to text, etc.)
- Handle errors uniformly
- Add performance tracking
- Return consistent response format
subtasks.testStrategy: Generated routes match manual implementations

subtasks.title: Create UI Generator for MCP Tools
subtasks.description: Generate consistent UI from configurations
subtasks.details:

- Parameter inputs with proper types

- Error states
- Loading states
All from configuration
subtasks.testStrategy: UI consistency across all endpoints

tasks.title: Implement Core Endpoints via Config
tasks.description: Migrate core endpoints to configuration system with proper data transformation
tasks.details:
Implement these core endpoints with proper transformations:
1. Scripture endpoints (USFM to clean text)
2. Translation Notes (TSV parsing, reference filtering)
3. Translation Words (article assembly, ToC endpoint)
4. Translation Words Links (verse-to-word bridge)
5. Translation Questions (TSV parsing)
6. Translation Academy (article serving, ToC endpoint)
7. Discovery endpoints (languages, books per resource)
8. Context endpoints (combined fetching)

Each must handle real data transformations, not just pass through
tasks.testStrategy: Each endpoint returns properly transformed uW data, tests use real resource content

Handle:
- Verse, verse ranges, pericopes, chapters

Translation Words Links:

This is how humans understand what's available to AI!

tasks.title: Final Testing & Deployment
tasks.description: Comprehensive testing with REAL data and production deployment
tasks.details:
Testing requirements:
1. REAL data validation (not just 200 OK)
2. Performance <500ms for typical queries
3. Actual scripture text validation
4. Real tN, tW, tWL content checks
5. No hanging commands or prompts
6. Documentation matches implementation exactly
7. Fix all deployment scripts to run unattended

6-month vision:
- Industry standard for uW resource access
- Smart endpoints inferring user intent
- Offline capability via .zip downloads
tasks.testStrategy: Every test validates real resource data, deployment completes without hanging

subtasks.title: Implement Real Data Tests
subtasks.description: Replace status code checks with content validation
subtasks.details:
For each endpoint test:
- Validate actual scripture text
- Check tN content matches reference
- Verify tW articles assembled correctly
- Test tWL mappings are accurate
- Use real verse ranges, not just single verses
- Test edge cases with real data
subtasks.testStrategy: Tests fail if data is wrong, not just missing

subtasks.title: Performance Benchmarking
subtasks.description: Ensure <500ms response for typical queries
subtasks.details:
Benchmark:
- Single verse: <200ms
- Verse range: <300ms
- Chapter: <500ms
- With caching: <100ms
- Concurrent requests handling
- Memory usage under load
subtasks.testStrategy: Meet all performance targets

subtasks.title: Fix Deployment Scripts
subtasks.description: Ensure all scripts run without hanging
subtasks.details:
Update all scripts:
- Add --yes to deployment prompts
- Add --no-watch to test commands
- Fix commit message automation
- Remove any pause/wait commands
- Test full deployment unattended
subtasks.testStrategy: npm run deploy completes without interaction

subtasks.title: Documentation Final Review
subtasks.description: Ensure docs match implementation exactly
subtasks.details:
Verify:
- Every endpoint documented accurately
- Response shapes match reality
- Examples use real data
- No outdated information

- Updated changelog
subtasks.testStrategy: Documentation 100% accurate

subtasks.title: Production Deployment
subtasks.description: Deploy with confidence
subtasks.details:
Final deployment:
- Run full test suite
- Deploy to staging first
- Smoke test all endpoints
- Deploy to production
- Monitor for 24 hours
- Prepare rollback plan
subtasks.testStrategy: Zero errors in production for 24 hours

subtasks.title: Fix get-translation-word endpoint
subtasks.description: Implement real article fetching from DCS markdown files instead of returning fake paths
subtasks.details: Current issue: Returns paths like 'bible/kt/beloved.md' that don't fetch content. Fix: Implement proper DCS markdown fetching using the TWLink RC paths to get actual article content including title, subtitle, and full markdown content.

subtasks.title: Fix fetch-translation-questions path logic
subtasks.description: Fix wrong file path structure that tries JHN/3.md instead of proper TSV paths
subtasks.details: Current: Tries to fetch 'JHN/3.md' which doesn't exist. Fix: Use proper TSV file structure from manifest.yaml to fetch translation questions correctly.

subtasks.title: Implement get-context aggregation
subtasks.description: Build the computed data source for comprehensive verse context
subtasks.details: Implement aggregation of: All scripture versions for the language (full chapter), Translation notes (book/chapter/verse), All unique translation words via TWL, Translation questions, Translation Academy articles from RC links. Return as flexible array structure.

subtasks.title: Add version filtering to fetch-scripture
subtasks.description: Implement proper version parameter filtering instead of returning all versions
subtasks.details: Current: Ignores version parameter, always returns all 4 versions. Fix: When version parameter specified, filter results to only that version while maintaining consistent array response structure.

subtasks.title: Implement helpful error messages
subtasks.description: Add LLM-friendly error messages with clear guidance on how to fix issues
subtasks.details: For all endpoints: Invalid references should return 400 with list of valid books, Missing parameters should explain defaults and link to discovery endpoints, When resources not found distinguish between file-not-found vs org/lang combo not existing. Always provide explicit examples of correct usage.

tasks.title: AI Assistant Chat Interface
tasks.description: Build the paramount showcase 'Taste and See' experience with sacred text constraints and full transparency
tasks.details:
THE SHOWCASE - This is what partners will see first!

Core Requirements:
1. Sacred Text Constraints:
   - Scripture quoted VERBATIM (character for character)
   - NO interpretation of scripture allowed
   - Resources can be reworded but must cite sources
   - All responses must cite resource titles used

2. Clean Chat Interface:
   - First-class, polished UI (not cluttered)
   - Progressive disclosure (simple â†’ detailed)
   - Mobile-responsive design

3. X-Ray Tool Visibility:
   - Show MCP tool discovery process
   - Expandable tool call details
   - Response time metrics
   - Cache hit/miss indicators
   - Like reasoning traces but for tool usage

4. Transparency Features:
   - New MCP endpoint: get-system-prompt
   - Shows exact constraints and instructions
   - Open source, open methodology
   - Sets collaboration bar high

5. Reference Implementation:
   - Shows partners exactly how to integrate
   - Demonstrates value proposition clearly
   - 'Taste and See' moment for users
tasks.testStrategy: User acceptance testing with actual translators, performance metrics under 500ms, validate sacred text compliance

subtasks.title: Design Clean Chat UI
subtasks.description: Create first-class, polished chat interface with progressive disclosure
subtasks.details:
Requirements:
- Clean, modern design (think Claude/ChatGPT quality)
- Not cluttered or gaudy
- Progressive disclosure: simple by default, detailed on demand
- Mobile-responsive
- Accessibility compliant
- Use existing BibleVerse and TranslationWord components
- Clear visual hierarchy

subtasks.title: Implement Sacred Text Constraints
subtasks.description: Build system prompt and validation for verbatim scripture handling
subtasks.details:
Implementation:
- Create system prompt enforcing verbatim scripture
- No interpretation allowed
- Resources can be reworded but must cite
- Validate all scripture quotes are exact
- Add citation requirements for all resources
- Test with edge cases (partial verses, ranges)

subtasks.title: Build X-Ray Tool Visibility
subtasks.description: Create expandable tool usage visualization with performance metrics
subtasks.details:
Features:
- Capture all MCP tool calls
- Show tool discovery process
- Expandable details for each call
- Response time for each tool
- Cache hit/miss indicators
- Total request time
- Clean, collapsible UI (not overwhelming)
- Like reasoning traces but for tools

subtasks.title: Add Transparency Endpoint
subtasks.description: Create get-system-prompt MCP tool for full methodology transparency
subtasks.details:
Implementation:
- New MCP tool: get-system-prompt
- Returns full system constraints
- Includes sacred text rules
- Shows citation requirements
- Documents all behavioral constraints
- Add to MCP tools page
- Include in API documentation

subtasks.title: Polish & Test Experience
subtasks.description: Ensure the showcase delivers the 'taste and see' moment
subtasks.details:
Testing:
- User acceptance with translators
- Performance < 500ms typical
- Sacred text compliance validation
- Mobile device testing
- X-ray feature usability
- Clear value demonstration
- Partner feedback incorporation
- Final polish pass

metadata.description: Translation Helps MCP 2025 Refactor - Simplifying to core functionality with proper tWL understanding and real data validation

tasks.title: API Contracts & Schemas (Zod adoption)
tasks.description: Adopt schema-first API contracts across endpoints; validate in handlers and tests; enforce scripture array response shape.
tasks.details:
- Introduce Zod schemas per endpoint (request/response)
- Validate handler responses against schemas
- Tests parse responses using the same schemas
- Enforce scripture endpoints to always return an array (single-item when filtered)
- Update docs to reflect contract stability
tasks.testStrategy: Unit + integration tests parse schemas; regression tests for scripture array shape

subtasks.title: Define Zod schemas per endpoint
subtasks.description: Create request/response schemas for all core endpoints.
subtasks.details: Include scripture, notes, words, word-links, questions, academy, discovery, context.

subtasks.title: Validate handler responses
subtasks.description: Wire schema validation into all handlers before return.
subtasks.details: Fail fast with error envelope on mismatch; log traceId.

subtasks.title: Tests parse schemas
subtasks.description: Update unit/integration tests to parse responses using schemas.
subtasks.details: Add failure messages that show how to fix.

subtasks.title: Scripture array response enforcement
subtasks.description: Normalize scripture endpoints to always return an array.
subtasks.details: Single version â†’ single-item array; update docs and tests.

tasks.title: Error Policy & Standard Envelope
tasks.description: Implement consistent 400 errors with actionable guidance and links; standard error envelope across endpoints.
tasks.details:
- Create error helper returning { code, message, hint, howToFix, examples, docs, traceId }
- Invalid references â†’ 400 with examples + discovery links
- Distinguish file-not-found vs org/lang not found
- Wire into handlers uniformly
tasks.testStrategy: Negative tests for invalid reference/missing params assert envelope + guidance

subtasks.title: Create error helper
subtasks.description: Standard error envelope function with guidance fields.
subtasks.details: Fields: code, message, hint, howToFix, examples, docs, traceId.

subtasks.title: Wire into handlers
subtasks.description: Use error helper across endpoints; remove ad-hoc 400s.
subtasks.details: Invalid reference/missing params receive actionable guidance and links.

tasks.title: Logging & Observability Unification
tasks.description: Replace console with logger in src/**; respect LOG_LEVEL; ensure tracer reports realistic cache timings.
tasks.details:
- Sweep src/** to replace console.* with logger.* (tests/scripts exempt)
- Add LOG_LEVEL env (default info) and debug path
- Ensure KV/memory hit timings include fetch+decode (no 0ms)
- X-Ray trace integration review
tasks.testStrategy: Greps confirm no console in src/**; tracer timings verified in tests

subtasks.title: Console sweep
subtasks.description: Replace console.* with logger.* in src/**
subtasks.details: Tests/scripts exempt by lint rule; use LOG_LEVEL env

subtasks.title: Tracer timing fixes
subtasks.description: Ensure cache hits include KV/memory fetch+decode time (no 0ms).
subtasks.details: Report timings in X-Ray trace and response metadata.

tasks.title: Caching Model Hardening (KV-first)
tasks.description: Enforce KV-first with memory fallback only; unify TTLs/prefixes; namespaced file cache keys; fix timing reporting.
tasks.details:
- KV-first enforcement; memory fallback only when KV unavailable
- Optional tiny LRU behind env flag (off in prod)
- Unify TTLs/prefixes; document retention
- Namespaced file cache for extracted ZIPs: internal://zip/<org/repo:ref>/<filePath>
- Ensure timing reflects KV hit latency
tasks.testStrategy: Cache hit/miss tests; timing assertions; key naming verified

subtasks.title: Enforce KV-first, memory fallback only
subtasks.description: Ensure cache path uses KV by default; memory only when KV unavailable.
subtasks.details: Add env guard for optional small LRU; disabled in prod.

subtasks.title: Unify TTLs & prefixes
subtasks.description: Centralize TTLs/prefixes for all cache entries; document retention.
subtasks.details: Document in code and docs; align with KV constraints.

subtasks.title: Namespaced file cache keys
subtasks.description: Cache extracted ZIP files with internal://zip/<org/repo:ref>/<filePath>.
subtasks.details: Implement and verify hit ratios + timing.

tasks.title: ZIP Fetching Policy Consolidation
tasks.description: Deprecate legacy ZIP fetchers; mandate ZipResourceFetcher2; update docs and call sites.
tasks.details:
- Move legacy ZipResourceFetcher to legacy/ with DO-NOT-USE
- Ensure ZipResourceFetcher2 is sole implementation
- Update references and docs
tasks.testStrategy: Code search shows no references to legacy class; tests pass

subtasks.title: Move Legacy ZipResourceFetcher
subtasks.description: Move the legacy ZipResourceFetcher to the legacy directory and mark it with a DO-NOT-USE banner.
subtasks.details: Ensure that the legacy ZipResourceFetcher is clearly marked as deprecated and moved to the legacy/ directory.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify that the legacy ZipResourceFetcher is no longer in the main codebase.

subtasks.title: Implement ZipResourceFetcher2
subtasks.description: Ensure that ZipResourceFetcher2 is the sole implementation for ZIP fetching.
subtasks.details: Review all instances of ZIP fetching to confirm that only ZipResourceFetcher2 is being used.
subtasks.testStrategy: Conduct a code search to ensure no references to the legacy ZipResourceFetcher remain.

subtasks.title: Update Documentation
subtasks.description: Update all relevant documentation to reflect the changes made in ZIP fetching policy.
subtasks.details: Ensure that all references to the legacy fetcher are removed and replaced with information about ZipResourceFetcher2.
subtasks.testStrategy: Perform a documentation review to confirm all updates are accurate and complete.

subtasks.title: Update Call Sites
subtasks.description: Update all call sites in the codebase to use ZipResourceFetcher2 instead of the legacy fetcher.
subtasks.details: Identify and modify all instances where the legacy fetcher is called to ensure they now utilize ZipResourceFetcher2.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run tests to confirm that all call sites function correctly with ZipResourceFetcher2.

subtasks.title: Conduct Final Review
subtasks.description: Perform a final review of the changes to ensure compliance with the new ZIP fetching policy.
subtasks.details: Review all changes made to confirm that the legacy fetcher is deprecated and ZipResourceFetcher2 is properly implemented.
subtasks.testStrategy: Conduct a comprehensive code review and run all tests to ensure system integrity.

tasks.title: DCS Ingredients Helper & Rollout
tasks.description: Create single helper for catalog search + metadataType=rc â†’ ingredients; case-insensitive book matching; replace call sites.

- Case-insensitive book code matching
- Replace bespoke implementations
- Document exceptions and add tests
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for helper; integration confirms identical or improved results

subtasks.title: Build Helper for RC Ingredients Flow
subtasks.description: Create a pure helper function that covers the rc ingredients flow.
subtasks.details: Ensure the helper handles all necessary cases and documents any exceptions encountered during the process.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests to validate the helper's functionality.

subtasks.title: Implement Case-Insensitive Book Code Matching

subtasks.title: Replace Bespoke Implementations
subtasks.description: Identify and replace all bespoke implementations with the new helper.

subtasks.title: Document Exceptions and Edge Cases
subtasks.description: Document any exceptions and edge cases encountered during the helper's development.

subtasks.testStrategy: Review documentation for completeness and clarity.

subtasks.title: Add Tests for Helper Functionality
subtasks.description: Create tests to validate the functionality of the new helper.
subtasks.details: Ensure that both unit and integration tests are included to cover all aspects of the helper's functionality.

tasks.title: Performance SLOs & CI Gates
tasks.description: Add tracer-based performance tests and CI gating for verse/range/chapter + cache-hit scenarios.
tasks.details:
- Tests: verse <200ms, range <300ms, chapter <500ms, cache hits <100ms
- Gate CI on thresholds; expose env overrides for local
tasks.testStrategy: Vitest/Playwright timings asserted; CI fails on regressions

subtasks.title: Define Performance Test Scenarios
subtasks.description: Outline specific performance test scenarios for verse, range, chapter, and cache-hit based on the provided thresholds.
subtasks.details: Create detailed descriptions of each performance test scenario, including expected outcomes and metrics to be collected.
subtasks.testStrategy: Documented scenarios reviewed for completeness and accuracy.

subtasks.title: Implement Tracer-Based Performance Tests
subtasks.description: Develop and integrate tracer-based performance tests for the defined scenarios.
subtasks.details: Utilize existing tracing tools to create tests that measure performance against the defined thresholds.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run tests to ensure they accurately measure performance and report results.

subtasks.title: Set Up CI Gating Mechanism
subtasks.description: Establish CI gating based on the performance test results to ensure that thresholds are not exceeded.
subtasks.details: Configure CI/CD pipeline to fail builds if performance thresholds are breached.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify CI pipeline fails on performance regression.

subtasks.title: Expose Environment Overrides for Local Testing
subtasks.description: Implement environment variable overrides to allow local testing of performance thresholds.
subtasks.details: Create a mechanism to override performance thresholds in local environments for testing purposes.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test local overrides to ensure they function as expected.

subtasks.title: Document Performance SLOs and CI Gates
subtasks.description: Create documentation detailing the performance SLOs and CI gating process for future reference.
subtasks.details: Write comprehensive documentation that includes performance thresholds, test scenarios, and CI gating procedures.
subtasks.testStrategy: Review documentation for clarity and completeness.

tasks.title: Deprecations & Housekeeping
tasks.description: Move unused code to legacy/ with banners; add one-cycle removal notice; add rule to block usage.

- Move unused to legacy/; add DO-NOT-USE banner headers
- CHANGELOG note: removal next release
- Rule doc/ESLint guidance to prevent usage

subtasks.title: Move Unused Code to Legacy Directory
subtasks.description: Identify and move all unused code to the legacy/ directory.
subtasks.details: Ensure that all unused code is properly relocated to the legacy/ directory.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify that all unused code is moved and no longer accessible from the main codebase.

subtasks.title: Add DO-NOT-USE Banner Headers

subtasks.details: Include a clear DO-NOT-USE banner at the top of each file moved to the legacy/ directory.
subtasks.testStrategy: Check that all files in legacy/ contain the appropriate banner headers.

subtasks.title: Update CHANGELOG for Removal Notice

subtasks.details: Document the removal of unused code in the CHANGELOG to inform users of upcoming changes.
subtasks.testStrategy: Ensure the CHANGELOG is updated and reflects the removal notice accurately.

subtasks.title: Create ESLint Rule Documentation
subtasks.description: Draft documentation for the new ESLint rule to block usage of legacy code.
subtasks.details: Provide clear guidance on the ESLint rule that prevents the usage of any code in the legacy/ directory.
subtasks.testStrategy: Review the documentation for clarity and completeness.

subtasks.title: Implement ESLint Rule
subtasks.description: Implement the ESLint rule that blocks usage of any code from the legacy/ directory.
subtasks.details: Ensure that the ESLint rule is active and correctly configured to prevent usage of legacy code.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run linting checks to confirm that the rule catches any attempts to use legacy code.

tasks.title: Scripture Mapping Cleanup

- Implement derived lookup via ingredients/zip listings
- Replace usages (e.g., ResourceAggregator)
- Add tests for case-insensitive matching

subtasks.title: Remove Numeric Filename Maps
subtasks.description: Eliminate all numeric filename maps from the project.
subtasks.details: Identify and remove all instances of numeric filename maps from the codebase.
subtasks.testStrategy: Code review to ensure no numeric maps remain.

subtasks.title: Implement Derived Lookup
subtasks.description: Create a derived lookup mechanism using metadata and zip listings.
subtasks.details: Develop a lookup system that utilizes ingredients and zip listings to replace numeric filename maps.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests to verify the correctness of the derived lookup.

subtasks.title: Replace Usages in Code
subtasks.description: Replace all usages of numeric filename maps in the codebase, such as in ResourceAggregator.
subtasks.details: Search for and replace all instances of numeric filename maps with the new derived lookup.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration tests to ensure functionality remains intact after replacements.

subtasks.title: Add Case-Insensitive Matching Tests
subtasks.description: Develop tests to ensure case-insensitive matching works correctly.
subtasks.details: Create unit tests that validate the case-insensitive matching functionality.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests to confirm case-insensitive matching behaves as expected.

subtasks.title: Verify No Numeric Maps Used
subtasks.description: Conduct a final verification to ensure no numeric maps are used in the codebase.
subtasks.details: Perform a comprehensive search and review to confirm that all numeric maps have been eliminated.
subtasks.testStrategy: Use greps to ensure no numeric maps are present in the codebase.

tasks.title: Chat Showcase Revival (/chat via MCP)
tasks.description: Restore /chat as a self-discoverable MCP client; no hardcoded endpoints; prompt-only adjustable.
tasks.details:
- Re-enable MCP tool discovery path
- Remove endpoint hardcoding
- Verify transparency/X-ray and performance
- Mobile + accessibility polish
tasks.testStrategy: E2E tests for chat flows; MCP tool discovery works; perf under SLOs

subtasks.title: Re-enable MCP Tool Discovery Path
subtasks.description: Restore the functionality that allows users to discover the MCP tools through the chat interface.
subtasks.details: Ensure that the MCP tool discovery path is fully operational and accessible within the chat client.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify that the MCP tools are discoverable through the chat interface.

subtasks.title: Remove Endpoint Hardcoding
subtasks.description: Eliminate any hardcoded endpoints in the chat client to allow for dynamic endpoint configuration.
subtasks.details: Refactor the code to ensure that all endpoints can be adjusted via prompts without hardcoding.
subtasks.testStrategy: Conduct tests to ensure that endpoints can be changed dynamically without issues.

subtasks.title: Verify Transparency/X-ray and Performance
subtasks.description: Ensure that the transparency and performance metrics of the chat client are functioning as expected.
subtasks.details: Test the transparency and performance features to confirm they meet the required standards.

subtasks.title: Mobile and Accessibility Polish
subtasks.description: Enhance the mobile and accessibility features of the chat client to improve user experience.
subtasks.details: Implement necessary adjustments to ensure the chat client is user-friendly on mobile devices and accessible to all users.
subtasks.testStrategy: Conduct usability testing on mobile devices and accessibility audits.

subtasks.title: End-to-End Testing for Chat Flows
subtasks.description: Develop and execute end-to-end tests for various chat flows to ensure functionality and performance.
subtasks.details: Create comprehensive test cases that cover all chat functionalities and performance under specified service level objectives (SLOs).
subtasks.testStrategy: Perform E2E tests to validate chat flows and ensure they meet performance criteria.

tasks.title: Docs & Rules Consolidation
tasks.description: Add/update rules: logging, ingredients-only, endpoint contracts/schemas, ZIP/KV policy, error responses; sync docs.
tasks.details:
- Create rule files with examples and references
- Update docs to reflect policies and helpers
- Link from README and MCP Tools
tasks.testStrategy: Docs lint; rule adherence visible in code and CI

subtasks.title: Create Rule Files
subtasks.description: Create rule files for logging, ingredients-only, endpoint contracts/schemas, ZIP/KV policy, and error responses.
subtasks.details: Each rule file should include examples and references to ensure clarity and adherence.
subtasks.testStrategy: Review rule files for completeness and accuracy.

subtasks.title: Update Documentation
subtasks.description: Update existing documentation to reflect the new policies and helpers associated with the rules.
subtasks.details: Ensure that all relevant sections of the documentation are updated to align with the new rules.
subtasks.testStrategy: Conduct a documentation review to ensure all updates are accurate.

subtasks.title: Link Documentation
subtasks.description: Link the updated documentation from the README and MCP Tools.
subtasks.details: Ensure that users can easily access the updated rules and documentation from the main project resources.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify that all links are functional and direct to the correct documentation.

subtasks.title: Sync Documentation
subtasks.description: Sync all documentation to ensure consistency across different platforms and tools.
subtasks.details: Check for any discrepancies between documentation versions and resolve them.
subtasks.testStrategy: Perform a cross-check of documentation across platforms.

subtasks.title: Conduct Final Review
subtasks.description: Conduct a final review of all rules and documentation to ensure compliance and clarity.
subtasks.details: Gather feedback from team members and make necessary adjustments before final approval.
subtasks.testStrategy: Collect feedback and ensure all changes are implemented before finalizing.

tasks.title: Release & Deployment Hardening
tasks.description: Make deployment fully unattended; version/changelog updates; staging + production roll with monitoring.
tasks.details:
- Fix scripts to pass --yes and non-watch
- Bump version; update CHANGELOG
- Stage deploy, smoke, prod deploy, 24h monitor
- Rollback plan
tasks.testStrategy: CI logs show unattended run; successful staging and prod smoke

subtasks.title: Fix Deployment Scripts
subtasks.description: Modify deployment scripts to ensure they pass the --yes flag and operate in non-watch mode.
subtasks.details: Update the scripts to automate the deployment process without manual intervention.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify that scripts execute without prompts and complete successfully.

subtasks.title: Version Bump and Changelog Update
subtasks.description: Increase the version number and update the CHANGELOG to reflect the latest changes.
subtasks.details: Ensure the versioning follows semantic versioning guidelines and the changelog is clear and concise.
subtasks.testStrategy: Check that the version number is updated in the relevant files and the changelog is accurate.

subtasks.title: Staging Deployment and Monitoring
subtasks.description: Deploy the application to the staging environment and set up monitoring for 24 hours.
subtasks.details: Conduct a smoke test post-deployment to ensure the application is functioning as expected.
subtasks.testStrategy: Monitor logs and performance metrics for any issues during the 24-hour period.

subtasks.title: Production Deployment
subtasks.description: Deploy the application to the production environment after successful staging tests.
subtasks.details: Ensure that all monitoring tools are in place before proceeding with the production deployment.
subtasks.testStrategy: Confirm successful deployment and monitor for any immediate issues.

subtasks.title: Rollback Plan Development
subtasks.description: Create a rollback plan to revert changes in case of deployment failure.
subtasks.details: Document the steps required to revert to the previous stable version if necessary.
subtasks.testStrategy: Review the rollback plan with the team and conduct a dry run if possible.

tasks.title: T-01: Dev Environment Setup (Docker + .env.dev)
tasks.description: Set up Docker Compose for local Qdrant (port 6333) and Redis (port 6379). Create .env.dev template with all required env vars.
tasks.details: Deliverables: scripts/docker/docker-compose.dev.yml, .env.dev template. Acceptance: docker-compose up -d && curl http://localhost:6333/healthz. See docs/rewrite-plan/TASKS.md T-01 and docs/rewrite-plan/CODEBASE_INVENTORY.md env vars section.
tasks.testStrategy: docker-compose -f scripts/docker/docker-compose.dev.yml up -d && curl http://localhost:6333/healthz && redis-cli ping

tasks.title: T-02: Scaffold Cleanup and New src/ Layout
tasks.description: Delete broken scaffold files (EmbeddingService.ts, VectorStore.ts, RagService.ts, SkillService.ts, broken tests). Create empty stubs for src/services/rag/, src/config/cache-ttls.ts, src/test-utils/.
tasks.details: DELETE: src/services/EmbeddingService.ts, VectorStore.ts, RagService.ts, src/skill/SkillService.ts, tests/embedding-service.test.ts, tests/skill-service.test.ts. CREATE empty stubs. DO NOT touch existing tools/parsers/ZipResourceFetcher2. See docs/rewrite-plan/SCAFFOLD_AUDIT.md and docs/rewrite-plan/TASKS.md T-02.
tasks.testStrategy: npm run typecheck && npm run lint

tasks.title: T-03: Port Domain Invariants + linkNormalizer
tasks.description: Verify all PORT-AS-IS files (referenceParser, r2-storage, ZipResourceFetcher2, platform-adapter, usfm-extractor) import cleanly. Create src/services/rag/linkNormalizer.ts (parseRcUri: rc:// to canonical path).
tasks.details: parseRcUri('rc://en/tw/dict/bible/kt/love') => {path: 'bible/kt/love'}. Port from src/experimental/resource-aggregator.ts. Add unit tests. See docs/rewrite-plan/TASKS.md T-03.
tasks.testStrategy: npm run typecheck && npm test -- tests/unit/link-normalizer.test.ts && npm test -- tests/unit/reference-parser.test.ts

tasks.title: T-04: Service Interfaces and TTL Config
tasks.description: Create TypeScript interface files in src/services/rag/: VectorStore.ts, KVStore.ts, ServiceContext.ts, errors.ts. Fill src/config/cache-ttls.ts with all TTL constants from CACHING_STRATEGY.md.
tasks.details: Interfaces per docs/rewrite-plan/DETAILED_SPEC.md. TTL constants: bundle 3600s, chunk 300s, catalog 3600s, resource-index 1800s, link-graph 86400s per docs/rewrite-plan/CACHING_STRATEGY.md. Error codes per docs/rewrite-plan/ERROR_HANDLING.md.
tasks.testStrategy: npm run typecheck && npm run lint

tasks.title: T-05: VectorStore Implementations (InMemory + Qdrant)
tasks.description: Implement InMemoryVectorStore (cosine similarity, BM25-style findByText, metadata filter) and QdrantVectorStore (uses @qdrant/js-client-rest, creates collection on startup).
tasks.details: Qdrant collection: name='translation-helps-{NODE_ENV}', distance=Cosine, size=VECTOR_DIMENSION (default 1536). Create payload indexes on language, resourceType, subject, project, ref. Port filter logic from scaffold per docs/rewrite-plan/SCAFFOLD_AUDIT.md VectorStore harvest. See docs/rewrite-plan/DETAILED_SPEC.md Qdrant init section.
tasks.testStrategy: VECTOR_DB_URL=http://localhost:6333 npm test -- tests/unit/vector-store.test.ts

tasks.title: T-06: KVStore Implementations + createDevContext
tasks.description: Implement InMemoryKVStore, RedisKVStore (ioredis), CFKVStore (Cloudflare KV wrapper). Create src/test-utils/createDevContext.ts wiring all InMemory implementations into a ServiceContext.
tasks.details: RedisKVStore uses ioredis. CFKVStore wraps Cloudflare KV binding TRANSLATION_HELPS_CACHE. createDevContext() used in all integration tests. Redis fallback to CFKVStore per docs/rewrite-plan/DETAILED_SPEC.md redis fallback section.
tasks.testStrategy: redis-cli ping && npm test -- tests/unit/kv-store.test.ts

tasks.title: T-07: EmbeddingService + LLMProvider Interfaces and Implementations
tasks.description: Implement EmbeddingService interface with FakeEmbeddingService (deterministic 1536-dim, not 32-dim), OpenAIEmbeddingService (batching + rate-limit retry + daily cap), LocalEmbeddingService. Implement LLMProvider with FakeLLMProvider and OpenAILLMProvider.
tasks.details: FakeEmbeddingService dimension MUST be 1536 (not 32 from scaffold). OpenAI: batch_size=100, BATCH_DELAY_MS=50, daily token cap via KV counter. See docs/rewrite-plan/EMBEDDINGS_PROVIDER.md. Update createDevContext() to include Fake implementations.
tasks.testStrategy: npm test -- tests/unit/embedding-service.test.ts && npm run typecheck

tasks.title: T-08: ResourceIndexer Rebuild with USFM/TSV/MD Chunkers
tasks.description: Rewrite src/indexer/ResourceIndexer.ts: canonical doc_id format, ZipResourceFetcher2 (no fs), license from manifest.yaml, idempotency check. Create usfmChunker (verse-level), tsvChunker (one row), markdownChunker (heading/paragraph).
tasks.details: doc_id: resource:{owner}:{project}@{refTag}:{path}:chunk:{i}. USFM chunker uses src/functions/usfm-extractor.ts. NO fs.readFile on edge (GOTCHAS.md #2). License from manifest.yaml dublin_core.license default CC BY-SA 4.0. Create src/test-utils/loadTestZip.ts. See docs/rewrite-plan/SCAFFOLD_AUDIT.md ResourceIndexer harvest.
tasks.testStrategy: npm run typecheck && npm test -- tests/rag-service.test.ts (index local ZIP, verify chunk metadata fields)

tasks.title: T-09: RagService.query with Tier-1 Reranking + Lexical Fallback
tasks.description: Create src/services/rag/RagService.ts with query() method. Pipeline: embed query -> ANN fetch 3xK -> Tier-1 reranker -> return K. Lexical fallback when vector DB unavailable. Metrics emission.
tasks.details: Port Reranker.ts to src/services/rag/Reranker.ts: fix recencyScore to use refTag (not timestamp), wrap frequency regex in try/catch. Tier-1 max 5ms, always active at edge. Metrics: search.query_duration_ms, search.vector_latency_ms, search.lexical_fallback. Request-ID propagation. See docs/rewrite-plan/RERANKING.md.
tasks.testStrategy: npm run typecheck && npm test -- tests/unit/reranker.test.ts && npm test -- tests/unit/rag-service-query.test.ts

tasks.title: T-10: RagService.getBundle + Multi-Layer Caching + Link Graph
tasks.description: Add getBundle() and indexResource() to RagService. Implement memory LRU + KV caching. Build LinkGraph.ts (BFS, depth 2, cycle detection via visited Set). Coalescing dedup key.
tasks.details: Bundle cache TTLs: memory 3600s, KV 86400s. LRU: 500 entries, lazy TTL expiry. LinkGraph: buildLinkGraph() BFS traversal with visited Set<string>, maxDepth=2, max ~500 nodes. Coalesce key: coalesce:bundle:{lang}:{ref}. Backref map for invalidation. See docs/rewrite-plan/LINK_GRAPH.md and CACHING_STRATEGY.md.
tasks.testStrategy: npm run typecheck && npm test -- tests/rag-service.test.ts && npm test -- tests/unit/link-graph.test.ts

tasks.title: T-11: SkillService Greenfield Rebuild with LLM Generation
tasks.description: Rebuild src/skill/SkillService.ts from scratch per SKILL_LAYER.md. Scripture from ZipResourceFetcher2 only. Notes via callTool('rag_query') through MCP layer. TW/TA via externalReference.path traversal. LLM generation with citations.
tasks.details: CRITICAL: scripture NEVER from RAG. Notes via callTool() not direct ragService.query(). Linked articles: collect unique externalReference.paths (cap 30), fetch via rag_query, classify tw (bible/) vs ta (translate/). composeTranslationReport calls LLMProvider.generate(). Port PromptFormatter with updated Bundle types. See docs/rewrite-plan/SKILL_LAYER.md orchestration pseudocode.
tasks.testStrategy: npm run typecheck && npm test -- tests/skill-service.test.ts

tasks.title: T-12: MCP Tool Wiring (rag_query, get_bundle, index_resource)
tasks.description: Update three MCP tool handlers: remove verbosity from ragQuery.ts Zod schema, fix cacheStatus path in getBundle.ts, add ADMIN_TOKEN guard to indexResource.ts.
tasks.details: ragQuery: remove verbosity z.enum([brief,full]). getBundle: change response.cacheStatus to response.metadata.cacheStatus. indexResource: add requireAdminToken() (Authorization: Bearer {ADMIN_TOKEN}). Update rag-tools.test.ts. See docs/rewrite-plan/SCAFFOLD_AUDIT.md port-with-changes verdicts.
tasks.testStrategy: npm run typecheck && npm test -- tests/rag-tools.test.ts && npm test -- tests/api/mcp-endpoint.test.ts

tasks.title: T-13: SDK Sync - js-sdk and python-sdk for RAG Tools
tasks.description: Update both SDKs per mcp-sdk-sync.mdc for rag_query, get_bundle, index_resource. Add types, client methods, and README examples to both packages.
tasks.details: JS: RagQueryOptions, GetBundleOptions, IndexResourceOptions in types.ts; ragQuery(), getBundle(), indexResource() in client.ts; update README. Python: same in types.py, client.py, README. Both must build. See .cursor/rules/mcp-sdk-sync.mdc checklist.
tasks.testStrategy: cd packages/js-sdk && npm run build && npm test; cd packages/python-sdk && py -m pytest; npm run typecheck

tasks.title: T-14: UI /api/skill/* Endpoints Rebuild with Validation
tasks.description: Rebuild SvelteKit skill endpoints with Zod validation, try/catch + proper HTTP status codes, rate limiting (60 req/min per IP), requestId propagation. Add new /api/skill/generate (SSE streaming).
tasks.details: Files: fetch-passage, query, compose-help, generate (new). Rate limit via KV token bucket keyed by CF-Connecting-IP. SSE for generate endpoint. See docs/rewrite-plan/SECURITY_AND_LICENSING.md and GOTCHAS.md #6 (deep relative imports: update after src/ reorganization).
tasks.testStrategy: npm run build && npm run typecheck

tasks.title: T-15: Contract Test Restoration
tasks.description: Restore missing tests/contracts/*.contract.test.ts source files from __snapshots__. Run test:contracts:update to regenerate. Verify diff shows only expected schema changes.
tasks.details: CREATE: rag-query.contract.test.ts, get-bundle.contract.test.ts, index-resource.contract.test.ts, fetch-scripture.contract.test.ts. Read __snapshots__/*.snap to infer shapes. DO NOT manually edit __snapshots__/. See docs/rewrite-plan/TESTING_STRATEGY.md contract test restoration plan.
tasks.testStrategy: npm run test:contracts && npm run test:parity

tasks.title: T-16: Staging Deploy, Load Tests, and Warm-up Cron
tasks.description: Implement Warmer.ts (warm-up cron for top-20 languages x top-100 passages). Add k6 load test scripts. Deploy to CF Pages staging. Verify P95 <= 500ms, cache hit >= 70%, error rate < 1%.
tasks.details: Warmer: warm on startup + nightly cron per docs/rewrite-plan/CACHING_STRATEGY.md algorithm. k6 scripts: tests/load/k6/rag-query.js, get-bundle.js. Deploy: scripts/deploy-staging.sh. Daily caps enforced per docs/rewrite-plan/COST_MODEL.md.
tasks.testStrategy: npm run load-test:baseline (P95 <= 500ms) && npm run load-test:peak (100 VUs, 5min, no crashes)

metadata.description: Architecture hardening + chat showcase revival tasks from PRD vNext (contracts, errors, logging, caching, ingredients-only DCS, SLOs, deprecations).
